message:
test(scope_tree): variant-dispatch Display coverage for 4 types (19 paths)

- ScopeId: Display for root + path-based IDs (zero tests existed)
- ScopeTier: all 5 variants (Root, Daemon, Watcher, Worker, Ephemeral)
- ScopeState: all 5 variants (Created, Running, Draining, Finalizing,
  Closed)
- ScopeTreeError: all 7 variants (DuplicateScope, ParentNotFound,
  ParentNotAccepting, ScopeNotFound, InvalidTransition,
  HasLiveChildren, TierCannotHaveChildren) — including UTF-8 arrow
  in InvalidTransition output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
